channel.title: Fancy Dress on amcs :: creative stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Fancy Dress on amcs :: creative stuff

item.title: Cupid
item.description: He was struggling to think of how he could make Valentine’s Day as special as his birthday. Perhaps he could dress as cupid and pay a late night visit to some random house, armed with the very real archery set he had received from his estranged father.

item.title: Fright
item.description: Dressed as a vampire David crept through the night-clad cemetery to where his friends waited; he was going to give them one hell of a fright when he sprang from behind a headstone. But they were already dismembered and dead, victims of the mad axeman who laughed and swung his weapon again when David leapt into view.
